title: Project
description: Root project document. Created at Stage 0. Fields marked immutable cannot change after Stage 1 begins. All other documents in the pipeline carry project_id as a foreign key.

project_id.description: Unique slug. Immutable after creation. Used as folder name and cross-document reference key.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Increment only on breaking changes.

topic.description: Human-readable topic title. Immutable after Stage 1.

topic_ja.description: Topic in target language, if different from English.

language.description: BCP-47 language code for narration and output. Immutable after Stage 1.

duration_minutes.description: Target video duration in minutes. Used to compute target_word_count.

style.description: Tone and format style. Controls template selection and pacing rules.

niche.description: Derived from style + language + topic. Controls which template is loaded.

template.description: Template filename loaded from templates/. Derived from niche.

target_word_count.description: Computed as: duration_minutes × words_per_minute × language_multiplier. Immutable after Stage 3.

words_per_minute.description: Baseline words per minute for the target language (English equivalent).

language_multiplier.description: Ratio of target language word count to English. ja=0.77, en=1.0, ko=0.85.

channel_name.description: YouTube channel name. Optional at creation, required before export.

pipeline_stage.description: Last completed pipeline stage. 0 = setup only.

qa_result.description: Result from Stage 11 QA and/or Human Review Gate. Null until QA runs.

review_fixes_count.description: Number of open fixes from Human Review Gate.

notes.description: Free-form notes for human use. Not consumed by pipeline.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601. Updated on every pipeline stage completion.

examples.topic_ja: 端島 / 軍艦島：消えた都市の謎
examples.notes: First test project for Runtime v1.
